notes: Works perfectly after copying/renaming fallout2HR.exe to Fallout2Launcher.exe
title: Fallout 2: A Post Nuclear Role Playing Game

notes: In addition to the fix of renaming fallout2HR.exe to Fallout2Launcher.exe I had to re-install the game into the default steam game directory under home (actually re-install, moving the install via steam didn't work). I originally had it installed on another hard drive but the log from proton would claim that my user didn't own some of the compatability files. After the re-install it launched fine.
title: Fallout 2: A Post Nuclear Role Playing Game

notes: Proton 4.2-3 fixed the launcher. Game now works out-of-the-box :)
title: Fallout 2: A Post Nuclear Role Playing Game

notes: Plays almost perfectly out of the box, except mouse lags very badly in fullscreen mode. Still lags, but a lot less, in windowed mode, but can be dramatically reduced by lowering the resolution.
title: Fallout 2: A Post Nuclear Role Playing Game
Fallout 2: A Post Nuclear Role Playing Game

notes: Game runs perfectly out of the box, except for a mouse lagging issue. WHowever, I fixed that issue by opening the config file at : "/.steam/steam/compdata/38410/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/Application Data/Fallout2/677556b5b09c9470a35e2dc3aa800011/f2_res.ini", and under [INPUT], changing ALT_MOUSE_INPUT=0 to ALT_MOUSE_INPUT=1
title: Fallout 2: A Post Nuclear Role Playing Game
Fallout 2: A Post Nuclear Role Playing Game

notes: Ran perfectly fine out-of-box for several hours without any crashes or other issues.
title: Fallout 2: A Post Nuclear Role Playing Game

notes: The game runs flawlessly, everything works and no tweaks were necessary.
title: Fallout 2: A Post Nuclear Role Playing Game

notes: I'm updating this report because of a bug that happened after 2 hours of gameplay, when the mouse was starting to lag, but it was the only bug encountered and here's the solution: I fixed that issue by opening the config file at : "/.steam/steam/compdata/38410/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/Application Data/Fallout2/677556b5b09c9470a35e2dc3aa800011/f2_res.ini", and under [INPUT], changing ALT_MOUSE_INPUT=0 to ALT_MOUSE_INPUT=1
title: Fallout 2: A Post Nuclear Role Playing Game

notes: No tweaks. Installed fine, no errors. Game runs and plays flawlessly so far. Maybe 2-3 hours of gameplay.
title: Fallout 2: A Post Nuclear Role Playing Game
